title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other GGUF models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models via the local REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; synchronous & async support, streaming, embeddings, tool calling.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); model management, RAG, multi-user, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; generate, chat, pull, delete models.

title: ollama-cli (deno)
summary: Deno-powered interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, written in TypeScript.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for Llama 3, Phi-3, Starling, and more; ready to pull.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; Generator, ChatGenerator and Embedder components.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Collection of recipes: function-calling, RAG, vision, fine-tune, Docker Compose stacks.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible builds on Linux/macOS with CUDA support.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats and generates images via local Ollama and Stable Diffusion.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings and LlamaIndex to chat over PDFs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes or brainstorm locally.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that threads replies using Ollama; supports model switching per channel.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose with Ollama, Open WebUI, and Chroma for instant RAG stack.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama REST API; generate, chat, embeddings, pull/push.
